command.fahh.resetSettings: Fahh: Reset All Settings to Default
command.fahh.factoryReset: Fahh: Factory Reset (Clear All Data & Settings)
walkthrough.fahh.title: Get Started with Fahh
walkthrough.fahh.description: Configure Fahh to play sounds on failures
walkthrough.fahh.step1.title: Test the Sound
walkthrough.fahh.step1.description: Run the 'Play Test Sound' command to verify audio is working.
walkthrough.fahh.step2.title: Choose Your Sound
walkthrough.fahh.step2.description: Pick from built-in sound packs or select your own custom sound.
walkthrough.fahh.step3.title: Configure Settings
walkthrough.fahh.step3.description: Adjust volume, quiet hours, and which events trigger sounds.
config.fahh.title: Fahh
config.fahh.enabled: Turn Fahh on or off. If off, no sounds will play.
config.fahh.soundPath: Path to your custom sound file. Leave empty to use the default fahh.mp3!
config.fahh.soundFolder: Path to a folder with many sounds. Fahh will pick one at random.
config.fahh.sounds.task: Sound for when a task fails (like a build).
config.fahh.sounds.shell: Sound for when a terminal command fails.
config.fahh.sounds.terminal: Sound for when a terminal window closes with an error.
config.fahh.sounds.test: Sound for when your tests fail.
config.fahh.sounds.debug: Sound for when a debug session crashes.
config.fahh.sounds.diagnostics: Sound for when new errors appear in your code.
config.fahh.successEnabled: Play a happy sound when a build or test succeeds.
config.fahh.successSound: The sound to play on success.
config.fahh.volumes.task: Volume for tasks (-1 uses the main volume).
config.fahh.volumes.shell: Volume for terminal commands (-1 uses the main volume).
config.fahh.volumes.terminal: Volume for terminal windows (-1 uses the main volume).
config.fahh.volumeCurve: How the volume feels (Logarithmic is usually better).
config.fahh.showNotification: Show a popup message when an error happens.
config.fahh.notificationLevel: How important the popup should look.
config.fahh.sources: Where should Fahh listen for errors?
config.fahh.sources.diagnostics: Listen to errors in your code editor.
config.fahh.sources.longTask: Listen to tasks that take a long time to finish.
config.fahh.cooldownMs: Minimum wait time between two sounds (in milliseconds).
config.fahh.cooldownPerSource: Wait separately for each type of error.
config.fahh.maxPerMinute: Maximum sounds allowed per minute (0 means no limit).
config.fahh.ignorePatterns: Words or patterns to ignore (no sound will play for these).
config.fahh.showStatusBar: Show the Fahh icon in the bottom bar.
config.fahh.statusBarCounter: Show today's error count in the bottom bar.
config.fahh.flashStatusBar: Flash the bottom bar red when a sound plays.
config.fahh.quietHours.enabled: Enable quiet hours (no sounds during specific times).
config.fahh.muteWhenFocused: Don't play sound if you are already looking at VS Code.
config.fahh.snoozeMinutes: How long to snooze for when using the Snooze command.
config.fahh.diagnosticsThreshold: How many new errors are needed to play a sound.
config.fahh.longTaskThresholdMs: How long a task must run before it's considered 'long'.
config.fahh.logLevel: How much detail to show in the logs.
config.fahh.historyMax: How many recent errors to remember in history.
config.fahh.speakLabel: Have your computer speak the name of the error.
config.fahh.webhookUrl: Send error info to another app (via Webhook).
config.fahh.aiSummary.enabled: Use AI to explain why your code failed.
config.fahh.dailySummary: Show a summary of today's errors at 6:00 PM.
config.fahh.streakCounter: Cheer you on for consecutive successes!
config.fahh.bossFightMode: Turn coding into a boss fight (lose HP on errors)!
